---
title: "Guides"
description: "Step-by-step tutorials and how-to documentation for RenderBrains."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "title asc"
  fields: [title, description, date]
---

Practical guides for working with RenderBrains: setup, integration, workflows, and feature walkthroughs.

---

::: {.callout-note}
Guides are published from `vault/` via `make sync`. To contribute a guide, create a note in `vault/notes/` or `vault/projects/` with `category: "guides"` and `publish: true`.
:::
